title: mikania elliptica
intro: Mikania elliptica, also known as the Trumpet Vine or Yellow Passion Flower, is a perennial vine native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mikania elliptica include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and pain management, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, taken as a capsule, or applied topically as an ointment or salve to reap its medicinal benefits.
